steps.title: Identify the sentence's structure
steps.content: The underlined sentence makes a direct claim—”demonstrates vast topographic knowledge”—and immediately supports it with specific evidence: named mountains, named rivers, and a first-ever sketch of the Missouri River's drainage network.

steps.title: Apply the structure to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C correctly describes the function: the sentence identifies reasons (the topographic evidence) why the map is impressive. The other choices reference content absent from this sentence.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
